projects.name: Trackr Web
projects.description: Main web application — task tracking dashboard and UI.

projects.name: Mobile App
projects.description: React Native companion app for iOS and Android.

projects.name: API Server
projects.description: Core backend REST API powering all Trackr clients.

tasks.title: Task filter state lost on page refresh
tasks.description: Active filters (status, priority) are cleared when the user refreshes the tasks page. Filters should survive via localStorage persist middleware.

tasks.title: New Task modal doesn't close after successful submit
tasks.description: After submitting a new task the modal stays open. Expected: modal closes and task list refetches. Reproducible on Chrome and Firefox.

tasks.title: Task list renders slowly with 500+ tasks
tasks.description: Profiling shows the task list takes >2 s to render when localStorage contains more than 500 tasks. Likely a missing useMemo on the filtered/sorted result before passing to the list component.

tasks.title: Dark mode contrast fails WCAG AA on badge text
tasks.description: Several badge variants (status: blocked, priority: trivial) have insufficient contrast ratios in dark mode. Need to audit all badge colour combinations against WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1).

tasks.title: Add bulk status update for selected tasks
tasks.description: Users need to select multiple tasks via checkboxes and apply a status change in one action. Useful for sprint close-out workflows.

tasks.title: Markdown support in task descriptions
tasks.description: Task descriptions are rendered as plain text. Add a Markdown renderer (remark/rehype) so code blocks, bold, and links display correctly.

tasks.title: Improve pagination UX on task list
tasks.description: Replace numbered pagination with an infinite-scroll or 'Load more' pattern. Current prev/next buttons feel dated.

tasks.title: Update README with local dev instructions
tasks.description: The README has no setup instructions. Add: prerequisites, pnpm install, pnpm dev, and a note about seed data loading automatically on first run.

tasks.title: Keyboard shortcut to open New Task modal
tasks.description: Power users expect a keyboard shortcut (e.g. C or N) to open the create task modal without reaching for the mouse.

tasks.title: Push notifications not firing on Android 14
tasks.description: Since Android 14, POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission must be explicitly requested at runtime. Our app skips this request and notifications are silently dropped.

tasks.title: App bundle size exceeds 50 MB
tasks.description: Current release build is 54 MB. Audit assets — large uncompressed PNGs and a duplicated lodash bundle are likely culprits. Target: <35 MB.

tasks.title: Biometric authentication support
tasks.description: Spike: evaluate react-native-biometrics vs expo-local-authentication for Face ID / fingerprint. Estimate implementation effort.

tasks.title: Camera permission dialog shown on cold start
tasks.description: On first launch the camera permission dialog appears before the user has navigated to any feature that needs it. Defer until first camera use.

tasks.title: Bottom nav icons misaligned on small screens
tasks.description: On devices with screen width <360 dp (e.g. Moto G Play) the bottom navigation icons overflow their hit targets and clip on the right edge.

tasks.title: Offline mode with background sync
tasks.description: Users in low-connectivity environments need to view and create tasks offline. Changes should queue and sync when connectivity is restored.

tasks.title: Haptic feedback on task status change
tasks.description: Add subtle haptic feedback (light impact) when a user changes a task status to make the interaction feel more tactile.

tasks.title: Integration tests for authentication flow
tasks.description: Write Detox E2E tests covering: sign-in, sign-out, token refresh, and biometric fallback to PIN.

tasks.title: JWT secret rotation without downtime
tasks.description: We need a zero-downtime key rotation strategy. Approach: support multiple valid signing keys simultaneously during a transition window.

tasks.title: Slow query on tasks table — missing composite index
tasks.description: EXPLAIN ANALYZE reveals a sequential scan on the tasks table for filtered list queries. Adding a composite index on (project_id, status, created_at DESC) should cut query time from ~800 ms to <10 ms.

tasks.title: CORS headers missing on OPTIONS preflight for /api/auth
tasks.description: Mobile clients receive a CORS error when making preflight requests to /api/auth/*. The OPTIONS handler doesn't include Access-Control-Allow-Origin.

tasks.title: Rate limiting headers absent on 429 responses
tasks.description: When rate limiting kicks in we return 429 but omit Retry-After and X-RateLimit-* headers. Clients have no way to back off gracefully.

tasks.title: Add CI type-check and lint step
tasks.description: Add a GitHub Actions workflow that runs pnpm type-check and pnpm lint on every PR — catches type errors and style violations before merge.

tasks.title: Remove deprecated TanStack Query v4 patterns
tasks.description: Several hooks still use the old `useQuery` object syntax from v4. Update to the v5 positional-options API and remove any deprecated `onSuccess`/`onError` callbacks.

tasks.title: OpenAPI 3.1 spec for all public endpoints
tasks.description: Generate and publish an OpenAPI 3.1 specification. Use zod-to-openapi to derive schemas from existing Zod validators.

tasks.title: Webhook delivery for task state changes
tasks.description: Third-party integrations need to react to task state changes in real time. Implement an outbound webhook system with retry logic and delivery logs.

tasks.title: GraphQL API layer spike
tasks.description: Evaluate adding a GraphQL layer (Pothos + Yoga) alongside the REST API to support flexible client queries. Estimate effort and maintenance cost.
